evals.prompt: Kick off a new idea: offline mode for the editor. Get it captured as planning work.
evals.expected_output: Reads the repo envelope, briefly frames the idea's intent and unknowns, creates the Linear home (initiative or project per the envelope) plus an idea/brief document via save_initiative/save_project and save_document, returns the created ids/links, and hands off to research or blueprint. Does not implement and does not create issues.

evals.prompt: lets start a new thing, offline editor idk yet, not sure what it even needs
evals.expected_output: Still activates on the vague, typo-laden new-idea prompt: frames the rough shape, lands a Linear home with an idea/brief that records the open unknowns, and routes to research because feasibility/scope are unclear. Avoids relitigating or full speccing.

evals.prompt: kick of a brand new initiaive for collaborative cursors
evals.expected_output: Activates despite the misspellings, reads the envelope for the target team and initiative-vs-project choice, creates the Linear home plus a brief document, and returns the links. No issues are created and no implementation begins.
Does NOT activate prospect; recognizes that decomposing a plan into tracked issues is the ghosts skill's job and routes there instead of creating a Linear home.

evals.prompt: write the PRD for offline mode now
evals.expected_output: Does NOT treat this as new-idea intake; speccing a PRD from known context belongs to blueprint, so it routes to blueprint rather than landing a fresh Linear home.
